diagrams.title: SGD Update Rule Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how parameters are updated in each iteration of SGD
diagrams.purpose: Understand the iterative update mechanism of SGD

diagrams.title: Convergence Comparison: SGD vs Batch GD
diagrams.description: Illustrates the difference in convergence paths between SGD (noisy) and Batch GD (smooth)
elements: SGD path: zigzag, noisy but progressing downward
Batch GD path: smooth curve directly toward minimum
Loss vs iterations graphs showing fluctuations in SGD
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why SGD converges noisily and trade-offs with batch methods

diagrams.title: Momentum Effect on SGD
diagrams.description: Shows how momentum accelerates convergence and dampens oscillations
elements: Without momentum: oscillations in narrow valleys
With momentum: faster movement along valley floor
diagrams.purpose: Understand how momentum improves SGD convergence

diagrams.title: Learning Rate Impact on SGD
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the effect of different learning rates on convergence
elements: Too small: slow convergence, many iterations
Too large: overshooting, oscillations or divergence
Learning rate decay effect over time
diagrams.purpose: Visualize importance of proper learning rate selection
